message:
feat(tui): narrow-width anomaly rail + inline trend annotation

Shows 1 condensed anomaly card on Compact terminals (was hidden).
Adds inline anomaly count indicator in event log title when the
anomaly rail is unavailable (Tiny terminals).  Adaptive card count:
1 on narrow, up to 3 on wide.  Footer pipe delimiter replaced with
spacing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
